sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15302" key="a)rnabw/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρναβώ</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n15302.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">zedoary,</tr_> Posidon.Jun. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.3</biblScope> </bibl>:—also <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρναβόν</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:135" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.135</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
